note: The organ registry — Cambium's machine-readable map of the constellation. Each organ is its OWN repo; Cambium does not contain organ code, it composes the organs as services. JSON (not YAML) on purpose: native zero-dep parse in both Node (the conductor) and Python (snow-gloves, brandmint), so the registry is language-neutral across the polyglot organs.

tiers.free: left brain — adoption flywheel (genesis + the build hands)
tiers.paid: right brain — the moat (ongoing taste, the shared memory, the portfolio OS)

genesis.name: Brand brain (genesis)
genesis.summary: idea → full brand system (persona, positioning, voice, logo, palette, copy, wiki) across waves 1–8
genesis.entrypoint: brandmint launch --waves 1-8 (CLI: brandmint.cli.app:main) · buildable flow alias: skill-clusters taste/scripts/brandmint.mjs (runBrandKit)
capabilities: understands: idea briefs and brand-config inputs

hands.name: The hands + conductor
hands.summary: 40 hub-and-spoke clusters + the conductor loop — build · maintain · market · operate; resolves any task to a real dev cluster
capabilities: understands: taste_brief plus structured build plans

taste.name: Taste cortex (conscience)
taste.summary: the aesthetic conscience — on-brand QA, taste-resolve, reroll; keeps every artifact on-brand and learns the brand's taste over time

will.name: The OS / will (business-ops)
will.summary: the business-ops organ — 7-agent C-suite, multi-tenant governance, GTM/distribution. ONE organ of the constellation, not the whole OS.
will.entrypoint: agents/dispatcher/ (agent spec; Hermes/Paperclip routing) · scripts/lib/gtm.py brand_to_gtm (brand-docs → Explee ICP, approval-gated)
capabilities: understands: artifact, brand_docs, brand_system, copy_system, visual_system
extends: approved copy_system variants for distribution
feeds: GTM and portfolio governance outcomes back into the system

cortex.name: Shared sensory cortex (NIM memory)
cortex.summary: the 1024-dim aesthetic memory shared by every organ — taste index + the brand's own assets + design-memory. The moat lives here. Currently duplicated across two Workers; I3 unifies.
cortex.entrypoint: NIM Worker endpoint (embed/search) — to be unified (see INTEGRATION.md I3)
capabilities: understands: asset_plan, acceptance_checks, and deviation signals
stores: shared aesthetic memory across tenants and stages
